rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §25.0915, which governs school district truancy prevention measures. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 25.0915. TRUANCY PREVENTION MEASURES. (a) A school district shall adopt truancy prevention measures designed to:
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses truancy prevention and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
